description_en: Provides income support of Rs 6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families across the country in three equal installments of Rs 2,000 each, directly transferred to their bank accounts.
description_hi: देश भर के सभी भूमिधारक किसान परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 6,000 रुपये की आय सहायता तीन समान किस्तों में सीधे बैंक खातों में प्रदान की जाती है।

other_criteria: Must own cultivable land
Not an income tax payer

benefits: Rs 6,000 per year in 3 installments of Rs 2,000 each

description_en: Provides affordable housing to urban poor with a subsidy of up to Rs 2.67 lakh on home loan interest rates under the Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme for EWS/LIG/MIG categories.
description_hi: शहरी गरीबों को किफायती आवास प्रदान करती है, ऋण ब्याज दरों पर 2.67 लाख रुपये तक की सब्सिडी।

other_criteria: Must not own a pucca house in any part of India
First-time home buyer

benefits: Interest subsidy of Rs 2.67 lakh on home loans
required_documents: Affidavit of not owning a house
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

description_en: Provides financial assistance of Rs 1.20 lakh in plains and Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly areas to rural houseless and those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses for construction of pucca houses.
description_hi: ग्रामीण बेघर और कच्चे मकानों में रहने वालों को पक्के मकान बनाने के लिए 1.20 लाख (मैदानी) व 1.30 लाख (पहाड़ी) रुपये।

other_criteria: Must not own a pucca house
Must be in SECC 2011 data

benefits: Rs 1.20 lakh (plains) / Rs 1.30 lakh (hilly areas) for house construction

name_en: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत - प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
description_en: India's largest health insurance scheme providing free health coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to economically vulnerable families.
description_hi: आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये तक का मुफ्त स्वास्थ्य कवर।

other_criteria: Family must be in SECC 2011 deprivation list

benefits: Free health insurance cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

description_en: Provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households, ensuring clean cooking fuel access and reducing health hazards from traditional cooking methods.
description_hi: बीपीएल परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन प्रदान करती है।

other_criteria: No existing LPG connection in the household
Adult woman of BPL household

benefits: Free LPG connection with Rs 1,600 subsidy for first refill and stove
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

description_en: Financial inclusion program providing zero-balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, Rs 2 lakh accidental insurance cover, and Rs 30,000 life insurance cover to unbanked citizens.
description_hi: बिना बैंक खाते वाले नागरिकों को शून्य बैलेंस खाता, रुपे कार्ड और बीमा कवर।

other_criteria: Must not have an existing bank account

benefits: Zero-balance bank account, RuPay debit card, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30,000 life cover
required_documents: Aadhaar Card or any valid ID

description_en: Small savings scheme for the girl child offering high interest rate of 8.2% with tax benefits. Account can be opened for a girl child below 10 years with minimum deposit of Rs 250.
description_hi: बालिकाओं के लिए 8.2% ब्याज दर की बचत योजना, न्यूनतम 250 रुपये से खाता खोलें।

other_criteria: Maximum 2 accounts per family
Girl child must be below 10 years

benefits: 8.2% annual interest, tax-free maturity, Section 80C deduction up to Rs 1.5 lakh

description_en: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 after age 60 for unorganized sector workers. Government co-contributes 50% of the premium for eligible subscribers.
description_hi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के कामगारों को 60 वर्ष बाद 1,000 से 5,000 रुपये मासिक पेंशन।

other_criteria: Must have a bank account
Must not be an income tax payer
Not a member of any statutory social security scheme

benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 after age 60

description_en: Provides collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh to micro/small enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishore (Rs 50,000-5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5-10 lakh).
description_hi: सूक्ष्म/लघु उद्यमों को 10 लाख रुपये तक बिना गारंटी ऋण — शिशु, किशोर और तरुण श्रेणी।

other_criteria: Must have a business plan
Non-farm income generating activities

benefits: Collateral-free loans: Shishu (up to Rs 50K), Kishore (up to Rs 5L), Tarun (up to Rs 10L)

description_en: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases at very low premium rates.
description_hi: प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों से फसल नुकसान पर बहुत कम प्रीमियम पर बीमा कवर।

other_criteria: Must be a farmer growing notified crops
Both loanee and non-loanee farmers eligible

benefits: Crop insurance at 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops

name_en: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
name_hi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी अधिनियम
description_en: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work at the minimum wage rate.
description_hi: ग्रामीण परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 100 दिन का रोजगार गारंटी अकुशल श्रमिकों के लिए।

other_criteria: Must be a rural household member
Willing to do unskilled manual work

benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment at minimum wage (Rs 267-333/day depending on state)

description_en: Provides 5 kg free foodgrains per person per month to about 80 crore beneficiaries covered under the National Food Security Act (NFSA).
description_hi: राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम के लाभार्थियों को प्रति व्यक्ति 5 किलो मुफ्त अनाज।

other_criteria: Must be covered under NFSA
Must have ration card (priority/AAY)

benefits: 5 kg free foodgrains (rice/wheat) per person per month
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

description_en: Multi-sectoral campaign to address declining child sex ratio, promote girl child education, and ensure survival and protection of the girl child.
description_hi: बालिकाओं की शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देने और लिंगानुपात सुधारने की बहु-क्षेत्रीय योजना।

other_criteria: Girl child in the family

benefits: Awareness campaigns, incentivized education, SSY linkage, institutional support
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

description_en: Facilitates bank loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore to at least one SC/ST and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
description_hi: एससी/एसटी और महिला उद्यमियों को 10 लाख से 1 करोड़ रुपये का बैंक ऋण नए उद्यम के लिए।

other_criteria: SC/ST or women entrepreneur
Greenfield enterprise (new business)
51% shareholding by SC/ST/woman

benefits: Bank loans of Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for new business, with margin money support

description_en: Flagship initiative for building a strong startup ecosystem. Provides tax exemptions for 3 years, self-certification for compliance, fast-track patent applications, and a Fund of Funds.
description_hi: स्टार्टअप के लिए 3 साल कर छूट, स्व-प्रमाणन, तेज पेटेंट, और फंड ऑफ फंड्स।

other_criteria: Entity must be less than 10 years old
Annual turnover not exceeding Rs 100 crore
Working towards innovation or scalable business model

benefits: 3-year tax holiday, self-certification, fast-track patent at 80% rebate, Rs 10,000 crore Fund of Funds
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade

description_en: Provides affordable working capital loans up to Rs 50,000 to street vendors to resume their livelihoods affected by COVID-19 with 7% interest subsidy.
description_hi: रेहड़ी-पटरी विक्रेताओं को 50,000 रुपये तक का कार्यशील पूंजी ऋण 7% ब्याज सब्सिडी के साथ।

other_criteria: Must be a street vendor with vending certificate/ID
Operating in urban areas

benefits: Loans up to Rs 50,000, 7% interest subsidy, digital payment incentives up to Rs 1,200/year
required_documents: Vending certificate or letter of recommendation
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name_hi: एससी/एसटी/ओबीसी छात्रों के लिए पोस्ट-मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
description_en: Scholarship covering tuition fees, maintenance charges, and other expenses for SC/ST/OBC students studying in post-matriculation or post-secondary courses.
description_hi: एससी/एसटी/ओबीसी छात्रों को पोस्ट-मैट्रिक पाठ्यक्रमों में ट्यूशन फीस और रखरखाव भत्ता।

other_criteria: Must be studying in post-matric course
Regular attendance required

benefits: Full tuition fees, maintenance allowance Rs 500-1,200/month, book allowance

description_en: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise nutrient recommendations to improve soil fertility and farming productivity through scientific assessment.
description_hi: किसानों को मिट्टी परीक्षण रिपोर्ट और फसल अनुसार पोषक तत्व सिफारिश कार्ड।

other_criteria: Must own or cultivate agricultural land

benefits: Free soil testing and health card with nutrient recommendations every 2 years

description_en: Ensures access to irrigation for every farm (Har Khet Ko Pani) with improved water use efficiency through micro-irrigation, drip irrigation, and sprinkler systems with 55-75% subsidy.
description_hi: हर खेत को पानी — ड्रिप और स्प्रिंकलर सिस्टम पर 55-75% सब्सिडी।

other_criteria: Must own agricultural land
Land should have access to water source

benefits: 55% subsidy for small/marginal farmers, 45% for others on micro-irrigation

name_en: Saubhagya Scheme (PM Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana)
name_hi: सौभाग्य योजना (प्रधानमंत्री सहज बिजली हर घर योजना)
description_en: Provides free electricity connections to all remaining un-electrified households in rural and urban areas, including solar-based standalone systems in remote areas.
description_hi: सभी बिना बिजली वाले ग्रामीण और शहरी घरों को मुफ्त बिजली कनेक्शन।

other_criteria: Household must not have an existing electricity connection

benefits: Free electricity connection, LED bulb, wiring, and meter for BPL households

description_en: Aims to provide functional household tap connections (FHTC) to every rural household by ensuring 55 lpcd (litres per capita per day) of potable water supply.
description_hi: हर ग्रामीण घर में नल से जल — 55 लीटर प्रति व्यक्ति प्रतिदिन पेयजल आपूर्ति।

other_criteria: Rural household without piped water supply

benefits: Free piped water connection providing 55 litres per person per day

description_en: Supports traditional artisans and craftspeople with recognition, skill training, toolkit incentives, credit support up to Rs 3 lakh, and digital marketing assistance.
description_hi: पारंपरिक कारीगरों को प्रशिक्षण, टूलकिट, 3 लाख रुपये ऋण और डिजिटल मार्केटिंग सहायता।

other_criteria: Must be a traditional artisan/craftsperson in one of 18 identified trades
Working with hands and tools

benefits: Rs 15,000 toolkit incentive, credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 5%, skill training with Rs 500/day stipend
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

description_en: Short-term recruitment in Indian Armed Forces for 4 years. Agniveers receive attractive monthly salary and a Seva Nidhi fund of approx Rs 11.71 lakh upon completion.
description_hi: भारतीय सशस्त्र बलों में 4 वर्ष की अल्पकालिक भर्ती, सेवा निधि 11.71 लाख रुपये।

other_criteria: Must have passed Class 10/12 depending on trade
Must be physically and medically fit

benefits: Monthly salary Rs 30,000-40,000, Seva Nidhi Rs 11.71 lakh after 4 years, skills certification

name_en: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
name_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर: मुफ्त बिजली योजना
description_en: Provides subsidy for installing rooftop solar panels enabling households to generate free electricity. Up to Rs 78,000 subsidy for up to 3 kW solar systems.
description_hi: छत पर सोलर पैनल लगाने पर 78,000 रुपये तक सब्सिडी — मुफ्त बिजली।

other_criteria: Must own a house with suitable rooftop
Must have a valid electricity connection

benefits: Subsidy: Rs 30,000/kW for up to 2 kW, Rs 18,000/kW for 2-3 kW (max Rs 78,000)
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

description_en: Aims to enable 3 crore women SHG members to earn annual income of at least Rs 1 lakh through skill training in various trades like plumbing, LED bulb making, and drone repair.
description_hi: महिला स्व-सहायता समूह सदस्यों को कौशल प्रशिक्षण से 1 लाख रुपये वार्षिक आय योग्य बनाना।

other_criteria: Must be a member of a Self-Help Group (SHG)
Women from rural areas preferred

benefits: Skill training, market linkage, digital literacy, credit access to earn Rs 1 lakh+ annually

description_en: Cash incentive of Rs 5,000 for first live birth and Rs 6,000 for second live birth (if girl child) to pregnant women for nutrition, partial wage compensation, and safe delivery.
description_hi: पहले जीवित शिशु पर 5,000 रुपये और दूसरी बालिका पर 6,000 रुपये नकद प्रोत्साहन गर्भवती महिलाओं को।

other_criteria: Pregnant and lactating women
For first and second live birth only
Must register pregnancy at Anganwadi/health facility

benefits: Rs 5,000 for first child, Rs 6,000 for second child (if girl), in installments
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

description_en: Aims to reduce rural poverty by mobilizing poor households into Self-Help Groups and providing them financial assistance, training, and market access for sustainable livelihoods.
description_hi: गरीब ग्रामीण परिवारों को स्व-सहायता समूहों में संगठित कर वित्तीय सहायता और प्रशिक्षण।

other_criteria: Must be from a rural BPL household
Willing to join/form SHG

benefits: Revolving fund Rs 15,000/SHG, community investment fund up to Rs 2.5 lakh, bank linkage

description_en: Provides margin money subsidy of 15-35% for setting up micro enterprises in manufacturing (up to Rs 50 lakh) and service (up to Rs 20 lakh) sectors.
description_hi: सूक्ष्म उद्यम स्थापना हेतु 15-35% मार्जिन मनी सब्सिडी — विनिर्माण 50 लाख, सेवा 20 लाख तक।

other_criteria: Must have passed Class 8 for projects above Rs 10 lakh
No existing government subsidy availed

benefits: Margin money subsidy: 25% (General urban), 25-35% (SC/ST/OBC/women/rural)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

description_en: Provides farmers with timely and adequate credit for agricultural needs at subsidized interest rate of 4% per annum (after subvention) with flexible repayment options.
description_hi: किसानों को कृषि आवश्यकताओं के लिए 4% वार्षिक ब्याज दर पर समय पर ऋण।

other_criteria: Owner cultivators, tenant farmers, and sharecroppers
SHGs and JLGs of farmers also eligible

benefits: Credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest (with subvention), crop insurance, Rs 2 lakh accident cover

description_en: Merit-based scholarship of Rs 12,000-20,000 per year for college and university students from non-creamy layer families whose parental income is below Rs 8 lakh per annum.
description_hi: मेरिट पर आधारित 12,000-20,000 रुपये प्रति वर्ष छात्रवृत्ति, पारिवारिक आय 8 लाख से कम।

other_criteria: Must be in top 20% of Class 12 board exam
Enrolled in regular college/university course

benefits: Rs 12,000/year for UG (1-3 yrs), Rs 20,000/year for PG, paid directly to bank account

description_en: Telangana state scheme providing Rs 10,000 per acre per year (Rs 5,000/season) to all land-owning farmers for investment support in agriculture.
description_hi: तेलंगाना — सभी भूमिधारक किसानों को 10,000 रुपये प्रति एकड़ प्रति वर्ष।

other_criteria: Must own agricultural land in Telangana
Land records must be updated in Dharani portal

benefits: Rs 10,000 per acre per year (Rs 5,000 each in Kharif and Rabi season)

description_en: Odisha state scheme providing Rs 10,000 per farmer family per year for cultivation support, Rs 12,500 for vulnerable agricultural households, and life insurance cover.
description_hi: ओडिशा — किसान परिवारों को 10,000 रुपये वार्षिक, कमजोर परिवारों को 12,500 रुपये और जीवन बीमा।

other_criteria: Must be a farmer family in Odisha
Small and marginal farmers prioritized

benefits: Rs 10,000/year for cultivation, Rs 12,500 for vulnerable households, life insurance Rs 2 lakh

description_en: Madhya Pradesh scheme providing Rs 1,250 per month to women aged 21-60 from families with annual income below Rs 2.5 lakh for financial empowerment.
description_hi: मध्य प्रदेश — 21-60 वर्ष की महिलाओं को 1,250 रुपये प्रति माह, आय सीमा 2.5 लाख।

other_criteria: Must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh
Must not be an income tax payer
Must not be a government employee

benefits: Rs 1,250 per month (Rs 15,000/year) directly to bank account
ministry: Madhya Pradesh Women and Child Development Department

description_en: Makes quality generic medicines available at affordable prices through dedicated Janaushadhi Kendras, with medicines priced 50-90% lower than branded equivalents.
description_hi: जनऔषधि केंद्रों द्वारा ब्रांडेड दवाओं से 50-90% सस्ती गुणवत्तापूर्ण जेनेरिक दवाएं।

other_criteria: Available to all citizens
Visit nearest Janaushadhi Kendra

benefits: Quality medicines at 50-90% lower prices, 1,800+ medicines and 280+ surgical devices

description_en: Transformative programme for digital empowerment including digital literacy (PMGDISHA), e-governance services, and digital infrastructure in rural areas.
description_hi: डिजिटल साक्षरता (पीएमजीदिशा), ई-गवर्नेंस सेवाएं और ग्रामीण डिजिटल अवसंरचना।

other_criteria: One person per eligible household for PMGDISHA
Priority to SC/ST/BPL/women/PwD

benefits: Free digital literacy training (PMGDISHA), Common Service Centres, e-governance access
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
